Petition To Approve Compromise Of Pending Action Of A Minor
Off Calendar Nov-12-2015 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for a Hearing on a Minor's Compromise.
Department 514, Judge: Charles Crompton, Clerk: A. Mok, CSR: Mitch Lyon, #6840.

Casey A. Kaufman, Esq., appearing for Plaintiff Ahmed Fuad, father and guardian ad litem for Minor: Sami Fuad present in court.
Witnesses sworn and examined.

After testimony and consideration of the evidence presented, the Petition is granted and compromise is approved as follows:
Total Settlement: $207,500.00
Attorney's Fees: $84,302.97 payable to Law Firm of The Brandi Law Firm
Costs: $39,701.54
A net balance of $83,495.49 to be deposited into a blocked account at:
Wells Fargo Bank 1335 Webster Street, San Francisco, CA 94115 until Minor reaches the age of 18 years.

Court signed Order Granting approval of Minor and Order to Deposit Money into blocked Account.
Status Hearing Scheduled on 2/16/2016 at 9:00 AM, in Department 514 for filing of receipt for the deposit of money into blocked account.
No appearance is required if the receipt is filed and courtesy copy lodged with Dept. 514 prior to Hearing.
